name: INSMED INC.  DL-,01
summary: Insmed Incorporated is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to discovering, developing, and commercializing therapies for patients with serious and rare diseases. The company's primary focus is on inhaled therapies for lung diseases, including bronchiectasis and nontuberculous mycobacteria (NTM) lung disease. Insmed is headquartered in Bridgewater, New Jersey, USA.
